_comment: Sample headless CLIENT run configuration. Use this when the simulator should connect to an existing remote TCP/UDP endpoint and push replay data to it.
_usage: Copy this file, adjust the values, then launch with config=/absolute/path/to/your-launch-config.json. CLI values override config-file values.

connection._comment: Client mode connects to a target endpoint. Replace ip/port with the destination you want to feed.
connection._connectRetryIntervalMs_comment: Milliseconds between connection retry attempts when connectWaitForServer=true. Default is 1000ms.
connection._connectWaitForServer_comment: Set connectWaitForServer=true to keep retrying until the remote server is available instead of failing immediately. The simulator will also reconnect automatically if the server is stopped and restarted during a run.
connection._grpc_comment: The following fields apply when protocol=grpc. grpcHeaderPathKey and grpcHeaderPath are sent as gRPC metadata on every outgoing call (client mode only).

headless._comment: Headless mode runs without creating the normal Electron UI.

output._comment: Optional logging and completion artifacts for automation.

streaming._comment: Replay two lines every 250ms, limit the run to a smaller batch, and exit when complete. Set loop=true and exitOnComplete=false to keep the simulator running continuously across server restarts.
